positive: A symmetrical celestial-nature maximalist abstract composition, depicting bioluminescent deep-sea flora merging with cosmic nebulae dust. The central subject is a stylized, intricate mandala pattern formed by flowing nebular ribbons (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and electric violet). Elements include geometric bioluminescent coral structures, symmetrical starburst patterns, and swirling galaxies viewed through a deep-sea window. Strong backlighting creating a halo effect around the main shapes. High contrast, clean silhouettes, detailed etching style, vector print quality, mystical and serene mood, perfect for repeating pattern or single chest print on dark fabric. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, low resolution, fuzzy, messy, poorly drawn hands, bokeh
